blackjack.name: Blackjack
blackjack.summary: Blackjack is a card game where the goal is to get a hand value closer to 21 than the dealer without exceeding 21.
blackjack.objective: Beat the dealer by getting a hand total closer to 21, or by the dealer busting (exceeding 21).

card_values.face_cards: Jack, Queen, King each count as 10
card_values.ace: Counts as 1 or 11, whichever is more favourable

basic_rules: Each player and the dealer receive two cards at the start
One dealer card is face up, one is face down
Players can Hit (take another card), Stand (keep current hand), Double Down (double bet, take one card), or Split (if holding a pair)
Dealer must hit on 16 or less and stand on 17 or more
Blackjack (Ace + 10-value card) typically pays 3:2
Going over 21 is a bust — the busting player loses

roulette.name: Roulette
roulette.summary: Roulette is a casino game where players bet on which numbered pocket a ball will land in on a spinning wheel.
roulette.objective: Correctly predict where the ball will land on the roulette wheel.

variants.european: Single zero wheel (0–36). Lower house edge.
variants.american: Double zero wheel (0, 00, 1–36). Higher house edge.
variants.french: Single zero with La Partage rule, returning half your bet on even-money wagers when zero hits.

bet_types.street: Three numbers in a row. Pays 11:1
bet_types.corner: Four numbers in a square. Pays 8:1
bet_types.dozen: First, second, or third dozen. Pays 2:1

baccarat.name: Baccarat
baccarat.summary: Baccarat is a comparing card game where players bet on whether the Player or Banker hand will have a value closest to 9.
baccarat.objective: Bet on the hand (Player or Banker) that gets closest to a total of 9.
basic_rules: Two hands are dealt: Player and Banker
If the total exceeds 9, only the second digit counts (e.g. 15 = 5)
Natural win is an 8 or 9 on the initial two cards
Third card drawing rules are fixed and automatic
Player bet pays 1:1. Banker bet pays 1:1 minus 5% commission. Tie pays 8:1

slots.name: Slot Machines
slots.summary: Slots are electronic games where players spin reels to match symbols across paylines for prizes.
slots.objective: Match symbols across paylines to win prizes according to the paytable.

key_concepts.reels: Vertical columns that spin and display symbols
key_concepts.paylines: Lines across the reels where winning combinations are counted
key_concepts.wild: A symbol that substitutes for most other symbols
key_concepts.scatter: A symbol that triggers bonus features regardless of position
key_concepts.bonus_round: A special feature triggered by scatter symbols, often with free spins or a mini-game
key_concepts.rtp: Return to Player percentage — the theoretical long-run payout rate
key_concepts.volatility: High volatility means bigger but less frequent wins. Low volatility means smaller but more frequent wins.

basic_rules: Select your bet size and number of paylines (if adjustable)
Spin the reels
Wins are paid when matching symbols land on active paylines from left to right
Bonus features may be triggered by landing scatter symbols
Each spin is completely independent due to Random Number Generator (RNG) technology

poker.name: Casino Poker (Three Card Poker)
poker.summary: Three Card Poker is a casino poker variant where players compete against the dealer using three-card hands.
poker.objective: Have a better three-card hand than the dealer, or place ante and play bets wisely.
basic_rules: Player places an Ante bet (and optional Pair Plus side bet)
Both player and dealer receive three cards face down
Player decides to Play (match Ante bet) or Fold (forfeit Ante)
Dealer must have Queen-high or better to qualify
If dealer does not qualify, player wins even money on Ante and Play bet pushes
If dealer qualifies and beats player, player loses both bets

sports_betting.name: Sports Betting
sports_betting.summary: Sports betting allows players to wager on the outcomes of sporting events at fixed or variable odds.
sports_betting.objective: Predict sports outcomes correctly to win payouts based on the odds offered.

bet_types.moneyline: Bet on which team or player wins outright
bet_types.point_spread: Bet on the margin of victory. The favoured team must win by more than the spread
bet_types.over_under: Bet on whether the total combined score will be over or under a set number
bet_types.parlay: Combine multiple bets into one. All selections must win. Higher risk, higher reward
bet_types.same_game_parlay: Multiple bets within the same match combined
bet_types.live_betting: Place bets during the event as odds update in real time
bet_types.asian_handicap: Eliminates the draw outcome by giving one team a head start

key_concepts.vig_or_juice: The bookmaker margin built into the odds
key_concepts.push: When the result ties the spread — stake is returned

sports_betting.house_edge: Typically 4–8% depending on market and sport
